The purpose of the Wagster Mst Closet Addition Project is to construct a 121 sq. ft. mst closet addition in the location of an existing deck. The existing deck will be removed. A new concrete foundation will be poured, 24”x12”, connecting the existing footings. An 8” block foundation wall with brick veneer will be laid to match existing foundation. Floor joist will be 2x10 with ¾” subfloor. Walls will be constructed of 2x4 with ½” O.S.B. sheathing and house wrap. Ceiling joists will be 2x8 – 16” O.C. Rafters will be 2x8 - 16” O.C., with ½” OSB sheathing and 30 yr. Dim shingles. Walls will be insulated with R-13 batt insulation, ceiling with R-33 batt insulation and floor with R-19 batt insulation. Interior of structure will be finished with ½” drywall and painted. Project will take approximately 8 weeks to complete at an estimated cost of $38,645.00.

Purpose: per master permit 2024047994, to construct unit fifteen with 1795 sf living area and 1086 sf garage deck porch.

We will be adding a 13.5' wide, 8' deep covered structure over the existing deck. The covering will not tie into the house for structural support, it will be freestanding with (4) 6 x6  posts in in-ground footings coming through the existing deck. The beams will be 4 x6  beams on all 4 sides. They will meet mitered on top of the notched 6x6 posts with 12  structural screws going straight down from the top of the beam into the posts on each side of the beams. There will also be 4  structural screws going from the notched piece of the posts laterally into the beams. The rafters will be 2 x6  and spaced 12  OC with a (2) 2 x8  ridge beam. The rafters will be tied to the beams with hurricane ties and rafter hangers on the ridge beam. The ridge beam will be supported by a 4 x4  post with metal connectors to the beam and ridge beam. The covering roof will match the existing house roof and the ceilings will be vaulted. There will be flashing from under the house siding out onto the roof of the covered structure.

Concrete  -Install gravel and drainage.  -Install concrete footers with necessary rebar reinforcement.  -Install concrete slab and trowel finish.  Framing  -Frame basement level walls per plan  -Frame 1st floor system per plan  -Frame exterior walls with door and window openings per plan  -Frame roof system with vaulted ceiling per plan.  -Tie in walls and roof system to existing home per plan.  Roofing  -Install synthetic underlayment, drip edge.  -Install (30 year) Architectural shingles per plan.  -Tie into existing roofing (does not include replacing existing roofing unless specified)  -Install standard 6in gutters and downspouts. (Does not include leaf guards)  Exterior Trim  -Install soffit, fascia, and exterior trim per plan.  Siding  -Install Hardie board & batten siding per plan.  Doors  -Provide and install exterior doors per plan. (See selection budget)  Windows  -Provide and install windows per plan. (See selection budget)  HVAC  -Provide and install ductwork to tie into existing system if the system can support the  additional sq ft. (to be evaluated during preconstruction)  Electrical  -Provide and install subpanel and run power from existing service per plans. (Size of  panel and wire determined by power needs)  Insulation  -Insulate exterior walls and roofline with open cell spray foam.  Painting  -Paint exterior, soffit, facia, trim, and doors. (SW Duration paint or comparable)  -Paint exterior siding. (SW Duration paint or comparable)  Clean up  -Clean up of site provided throughout the project including a final clean at the end.  General Conditions  -Jasper Project management and Superintendent time is billed per hour of time spent  managing the project.

Subject to Table 17.12.020D (RM15-A-NS zone district) for the 0' to 15' Build-To Zone, 5' side and 20' rear setbacks. Maximum 3 stories within 45' structure height. 25.5' standard right-of-way width (Section 17.12.030.A). Demo existing structures under permit #2025020556.    THE HOLDER OF THIS PERMIT HEREBY CERTIFIES THAT ALL CONSTRUCTION AND DEMOLITION WASTE WILL BE DISPOSED IN AN APPROVED LANDFILL. THE HOLDER OF THIS PERMIT ALSO CERTIFIES THAT NO CONSTRUCTION OR DEMOLITION WASTE SHALL BE STORED ON THE PROPERTY IN VIOLATION OF ANY PROVISIONS OF THE METROPOLITAN CODE.    FOR EVERY 50 FEET OF SITE FRONTAGE, A DOUBLE-SIDED SIGN 24” X 36” IN SIZE MUST BE POSTED IN ENGLISH AND SPANISH THAT CONTAINS THE INFORMATION REQUIRED BY ORDINANCE NO. 2017-835. NO MORE THAN THREE SIGNS ARE REQUIRED.    FOR EVERY 30 FEET OF STREET FRONTAGE, OR FRACTION THEREOF, ONE 2 INCH CALIPER TREE AS LISTED IN THE URBAN FORESTRY APPROVED TREE LIST SHALL BE PLANTED ON THE SUBJECT PROPERTY.
To construct a new single family residence.
